summary: Focused retest of brand-rename bug from iteration_6 - all 4 assertions PASS plus carousel regression PASS.

assertions_verified.assertion: 'Baked Growth' NOT in homepage / (default FR locale)
'Baked Growth' NOT in homepage with baked_locale=en
MobileShowcase carousel: 5 dots present, phone-next changes 1/5 -> 2/5, phone-prev restores to 1/5

context_for_next_testing_agent: Brand-rename bug fully resolved. 'Baked Growth' is gone from homepage (0 occurrences), /careers, /admin/login, and EN-locale homepage. 'Baked Group' confirmed present 21 times on homepage. MobileShowcase carousel regression also passes (5 dots, prev/next change active screen via counter 1/5 <-> 2/5). seed.ts self-healing logic working as expected.
rca of the issue: Previously, the DB-backed SiteSettings.copyrightText and HomepageContent.aboutBodyFr/En still contained 'Baked Growth' text. Main agent ran SQL UPDATEs to fix existing rows and added self-healing logic to seed.ts so re-seeding always normalizes those fields. Verified clean.
